'''âdh-l-k''' ('''kadhalak''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:mollycoddle|mollycoddle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-l-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mollycoddle|mollycoddle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âdh-l-k
|-
! Lemma
| kadhalak
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhalak|thidhalak]] || [[word:jidhalak|jidhalak]] || [[word:shidhalak|shidhalak]] || [[word:kidhalak|kidhalak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudhalak|thuthudhalak]] || [[word:jujudhalak|jujudhalak]] || [[word:shushudhalak|shushudhalak]] || [[word:kukudhalak|kukudhalak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudhalak|thudhalak]] || [[word:judhalak|judhalak]] || [[word:shudhalak|shudhalak]] || [[word:kudhalak|kudhalak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudhalak|thudhalak]] || [[word:judhalak|judhalak]] || [[word:shudhalak|shudhalak]] || [[word:kudhalak|kudhalak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedhalak|thedhalak]] || [[word:jedhalak|jedhalak]] || [[word:shedhalak|shedhalak]] || [[word:kedhalak|kedhalak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodhalak|thothodhalak]] || [[word:jojodhalak|jojodhalak]] || [[word:shoshodhalak|shoshodhalak]] || [[word:kokodhalak|kokodhalak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhalak|thodhalak]] || [[word:jodhalak|jodhalak]] || [[word:shodhalak|shodhalak]] || [[word:kodhalak|kodhalak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhalak|thodhalak]] || [[word:jodhalak|jodhalak]] || [[word:shodhalak|shodhalak]] || [[word:kodhalak|kodhalak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdhalak|thĂŠdhalak]] || [[word:jĂŠdhalak|jĂŠdhalak]] || [[word:shĂŠdhalak|shĂŠdhalak]] || [[word:kĂŠdhalak|kĂŠdhalak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadhalak|thathadhalak]] || [[word:jajadhalak|jajadhalak]] || [[word:shashadhalak|shashadhalak]] || [[word:kakadhalak|kakadhalak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhalak|thadhalak]] || [[word:jadhalak|jadhalak]] || [[word:shadhalak|shadhalak]] || [[word:kadhalak|kadhalak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhalak|thadhalak]] || [[word:jadhalak|jadhalak]] || [[word:shadhalak|shadhalak]] || [[word:kadhalak|kadhalak]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadhalak|shadhalak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadhalak|goshadhalak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadhalak|gokishadhalak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadhalaknĂŒ|shadhalaknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadhalaknknĂŒ|goshadhalaknknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhalaknĂŒ|gokishadhalaknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadhalakshĂ«|shadhalakshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadhalaknkshĂ«|goshadhalaknkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadhalakshĂ«|gokishadhalakshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhalakro|shadhalakro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhalaknkro|goshadhalaknkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhalakro|gokishadhalakro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhalakmu|shadhalakmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhalaknkmu|goshadhalaknkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhalakmu|gokishadhalakmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadhalaksher|shadhalaksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadhalaknksher|goshadhalaknksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadhalaksher|gokishadhalaksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadhalakng|shadhalakng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadhalaknkng|goshadhalaknkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadhalakng|gokishadhalakng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadhalakya|shadhalakya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadhalaknkya|goshadhalaknkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadhalakya|gokishadhalakya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadhalakyam|shadhalakyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadhalaknkyam|goshadhalaknkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadhalakyam|gokishadhalakyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhalaknĂŒshĂ«|shadhalaknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhalaknknĂŒshĂ«|goshadhalaknknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhalaknĂŒshĂ«|gokishadhalaknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhalaknĂŒro|shadhalaknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhalaknknĂŒro|goshadhalaknknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhalaknĂŒro|gokishadhalaknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhalaknĂŒmu|shadhalaknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhalaknknĂŒmu|goshadhalaknknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhalaknĂŒmu|gokishadhalaknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhalakshĂ«nĂŒ|shadhalakshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhalaknkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshadhalaknkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhalakshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishadhalakshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhalakshĂ«ro|shadhalakshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhalaknkshĂ«ro|goshadhalaknkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhalakshĂ«ro|gokishadhalakshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhalakshĂ«mu|shadhalakshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhalaknkshĂ«mu|goshadhalaknkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhalakshĂ«mu|gokishadhalakshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhalakronĂŒ|shadhalakronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhalaknkronĂŒ|goshadhalaknkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhalakronĂŒ|gokishadhalakronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhalakroshĂ«|shadhalakroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhalaknkroshĂ«|goshadhalaknkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhalakroshĂ«|gokishadhalakroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhalakromu|shadhalakromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhalaknkromu|goshadhalaknkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhalakromu|gokishadhalakromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhalakmunĂŒ|shadhalakmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhalaknkmunĂŒ|goshadhalaknkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhalakmunĂŒ|gokishadhalakmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhalakmushĂ«|shadhalakmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhalaknkmushĂ«|goshadhalaknkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhalakmushĂ«|gokishadhalakmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhalakmuro|shadhalakmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhalaknkmuro|goshadhalaknkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhalakmuro|gokishadhalakmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
